11: // Xilinx Peripehrals
12: module ariane_peripherals #(
13:     parameter int AxiAddrWidth = -1,
14:     parameter int AxiDataWidth = -1,
15:     parameter int AxiIdWidth   = -1,
16:     parameter int AxiUserWidth = 1,
17:     parameter bit InclUART     = 1,
18:     parameter bit InclSPI      = 0,
19:     parameter bit InclEthernet = 0,
20:     parameter bit InclGPIO     = 0
21: ) (
22:     input  logic               clk_i           , // Clock
23:     input  logic               rst_ni          , // Asynchronous reset active low
24:     AXI_BUS.in                 plic            ,
25:     AXI_BUS.in                 aes             , 
26:     AXI_BUS.in                 rom2_fuse       ,
27:     AXI_BUS.in                 pkt             ,
28:     AXI_BUS.in                 uart            ,
29:     AXI_BUS.in                 spi             ,
30:     AXI_BUS.in                 ethernet        ,
31:     output logic [31:0]        jtag_key        , 
32:     output logic [1:0][47:0]   access_ctrl_reg , 
33:     output logic [1:0]         irq_o           ,
34:     // UART
35:     input  logic               rx_i            ,
36:     output logic               tx_o            ,
37:     // Ethernet
38:     input  wire                eth_txck        ,
39:     input  wire                eth_rxck        ,
40:     input  wire                eth_rxctl       ,
41:     input  wire [3:0]          eth_rxd         ,
42:     output wire                eth_rst_n       ,
43:     output wire                eth_tx_en       ,
44:     output wire [3:0]          eth_txd         ,
45:     inout  wire                phy_mdio        ,
46:     output logic               eth_mdc         ,
47:     // MDIO Interface
48:     inout                      mdio            ,
49:     output                     mdc             ,
50:     // SPI
51:     output logic               spi_clk_o       ,
52:     output logic               spi_mosi        ,
53:     input  logic               spi_miso        ,
54:     output logic               spi_ss
55: );
56: 
57:     // ---------------
58:     // 1. PLIC
59:     // ---------------
60:     logic [ariane_soc::NumSources-1:0] irq_sources;
61: 
62:     REG_BUS #(
63:         .ADDR_WIDTH ( 32 ),
64:         .DATA_WIDTH ( 32 )
65:     ) reg_bus (clk_i);
66: 
67:     logic         plic_penable;
68:     logic         plic_pwrite;
69:     logic [31:0]  plic_paddr;
70:     logic         plic_psel;
71:     logic [31:0]  plic_pwdata;
72:     logic [31:0]  plic_prdata;
73:     logic         plic_pready;
74:     logic         plic_pslverr;
75: 
76:     axi2apb_64_32 #(
77:         .AXI4_ADDRESS_WIDTH ( AxiAddrWidth  ),
78:         .AXI4_RDATA_WIDTH   ( AxiDataWidth  ),
79:         .AXI4_WDATA_WIDTH   ( AxiDataWidth  ),
80:         .AXI4_ID_WIDTH      ( AxiIdWidth    ),
81:         .AXI4_USER_WIDTH    ( AxiUserWidth  ),
82:         .BUFF_DEPTH_SLAVE   ( 2             ),
83:         .APB_ADDR_WIDTH     ( 32            )
84:     ) i_axi2apb_64_32_plic (
85:         .ACLK      ( clk_i          ),
86:         .ARESETn   ( rst_ni         ),
87:         .test_en_i ( 1'b0           ),
88:         .AWID_i    ( plic.aw_id 
[TRUNCATED]

1:  /*
2:  * ROM2: Which have all the keys.
3:  */
4: 
5: module rom2 (
6:    input  logic         clk_i,
7:    input  logic         rst_ni,
8:    input  logic         req_i,
9:    input  logic         we_i,
10:    input  logic [63:0]  addr_i,
11:    input  logic [63:0]  wdata_i,
12:    output logic [63:0]  rdata_o,
13:    output logic [3:0][191:0]  secure_reg // Ideally [1:0] should be [RomSize-1:0]. In this case RomSize is 2.
14: );
15:     localparam int RomSize = 4;
16: 
17: // Store key values here. // Replication of fuse. 
18:     const logic [RomSize-1:0][191:0] mem = {
19:         192'h00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000_0000f8f8_ff6fe00f, // 3rd location for Access control master 1. First 4 bits for peripheral 0, next 4 for p1 and so on.
20:         192'h00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000_0000fff8_ff6ff00f, // 2nd location for Access control master 0. First 4 bits for peripheral 0, next 4 for p1 and so on.
21:         192'h2b7e1516_28aed2a6_abf71588_09cf4f3c_2b7e1516_28aed2a6, // 1st location for JTAG
22:         192'h55555555_28aed2a6_abf71588_09cf4f3c_2b7e1516_28aed2a6  // oth location for AES
23:     };
24: 
25: // Secure registers. Key values copied from fuse to these registers on reset.
26: //    logic [RomSize-1:0][191:0] secure_reg;
27: 
28:     logic [$clog2(RomSize)-1:0] raddr_q;
29: 
30: // We can read and write initial 64 bits.
31: // On reset, key values will be copied to registers.
32:     always_ff @ (posedge clk_i) begin
33:         if (~rst_ni) begin
34:             secure_reg <= mem;
35:         end else begin
36:         if(req_i) begin
37:             if (!we_i) begin
38:                 raddr_q <= addr_i[$clog2(RomSize)-1+3:3];
39:             end else begin
40:                 secure_reg[addr_i[$clog2(RomSize)-1+3:3]] <= wdata_i;
41:             end
42:         end
43:         end
44:     end
45:     // this prevents spurious Xes from propagating into
46:     // the speculative fetch stage of the core
47:     assign rdata_o = (raddr_q < RomSize) ? secure_reg[raddr_q] : '0;
48: 
49: 
50: endmodule

{"tool": "read_file", "status": "ok", "content": "180:     logic [31:0]                  pkey_loc_o;

184:

192:         .clk_i  ( clk_i                    ),

205:         .clk_i      ( clk_i      ),
206:         .rst_ni     ( rst_ni     ),

208:         .we_i       ( rom2_we    ),
209:         .addr_i     ( rom2_addr  ),
210:         .wdata_i    ( rom2_wdata ),
211:         .rdata_o    ( rom2_rdata ), // this will go to peripheral
212:         .secure_reg ( key_reg_out)

214:     
215:     assign jtag_key = key_reg_out[1][31:0];
216:     assign access_ctrl_reg[0] = key_reg_out[2][47:0];
217:     assign access_ctrl_reg[1] = key_reg_out[3][47:0];

271:         .WREADY_o  ( pkt.w_ready   ),

275:         .BUSER_o   ( pkt.b_user    ),
276:         .BREADY_i  ( pkt.b_ready   ),
277

268:     logic [AXI_DATA_WIDTH/8-1:0]

528:     axi_slave_connect i_axi_slave_connect_clint (.axi_req_o(axi_clint_req), .axi_resp_i(axi_clint_resp), .slave(master[ariane_soc::CLINT]));

530:     // ---------------
531:     // Peripherals
532:     // ---------------
533:     logic tx, rx;
534:     logic [1:0] irqs;
535: 
536:     ariane_peripherals #(
537:       .AxiAddrWidth ( AXI_ADDRESS_WIDTH   ),
538:       .AxiDataWidth ( AXI_DATA_WIDTH      ),
539:       .AxiIdWidth   ( AXI_ID_WIDTH_SLAVES ),
540:       .AxiUserWidth ( AXI_USER_WIDTH      ),
541:       .InclUART     ( 1'b0                ),
542:       .InclSPI      ( 1'b0                ),
543:       .InclEthernet ( 1'b0                )
544:     ) i_ariane_peripherals (
545:       .clk_i             ( clk_i                        ),
546:       .rst_ni            ( ndmreset_n                   ),
547:       .plic              ( master[ariane_soc::PLIC]     ),
548:       .uart              ( master[ariane_soc::UART]     ),
549:       .aes               ( master[ariane_soc::AES]      ), 
550:       .rom2_fuse         ( master[ariane_soc::ROM2]     ), 
551:       .pkt               ( master[ariane_soc::PKT]      ), 
552:       .spi               ( master[ariane_soc::SPI]      ),
553:       .ethernet          ( master[ariane_soc::Ethernet] ),
554:       .jtag_key          ( jtag_key                     ), 
555:       .access_ctrl_reg   ( access_ctrl_reg              ), 
556:       .irq_o             ( irqs                         ),
557:       .rx_i              ( rx                           ),
558:       .tx_o              ( tx                           ),
559:       .eth_txck          ( ),
560:       .eth_rxck          ( ),
561:       .eth_rxctl         ( ),
562:       .eth_rxd           ( ),
563:       .eth_rst_n         ( ),
564:       .eth_tx_en         ( ),
565:       .eth_txd           ( ),
566:       .phy_mdio          ( ),
567:       .eth_mdc           ( ),
568:       .mdio              ( ),
569:       .mdc               ( ),
570:       .spi_clk_o         ( ),
571:       .spi_mosi          ( ),
572:       .spi_miso          ( ),
573:       .spi_ss            ( )
574:     );
575: 
576:     uart_bus #(.BAUD_RATE(115200), .PARITY_EN(0)) i_uart_bus (.rx(tx), .tx(rx), .rx_en(1'b1));
577: 
578:     // ---------------
579:     // Core
580:     // ---------------
581:     ariane_axi::req_t    axi_ariane_req;
582:     ariane_axi::resp_t   axi_ariane_resp;
583: 
584: 
585:     ariane #(
586: `ifdef PITON_ARIANE
587:         .SwapEndianess ( 0                                               ),
588:         .CachedAddrEnd ( (ariane_soc::DRAMBase + ariane_soc::DRAMLength) ),
589: `endif
590:         .CachedAddrBeg ( ariane_soc::DRAMBase )
591:     ) i_ariane (
592:         .clk_i                ( clk_i               ),
593:         .rst_ni               ( ndmreset_n          ),
594:         .boot_addr_i          ( ariane_soc::ROMBase ), // start fetching from ROM
595:         .hart_id_i            ( '0                  ),
596:         .irq_i                ( irqs                ),
597:         .ipi_i                ( ipi                 ),
598:         .time_irq_i           ( timer_irq           ),
599:         .debug_req_i          ( debug_req_core      ),
600: 	    .priv_lvl_o	          ( priv_lvl_processor  ),  
601:         .axi_req_o            ( axi_ariane_req      ),
602:         .axi_resp_i           ( axi_ariane_resp     ),
603: 	.umode_i              ( ariane_umode)            
604:     );
605: 
606:     axi_master_connect i_axi_master_connect_ariane (.axi_req_i(axi_ariane_req), .axi_resp_o(axi_ariane_resp), .master(slave[0]));

409: module connectivity_mapping #(
410:     parameter NB_MANAGER      = 4,
411:     parameter NB_SUBORDINATE       = 4,
412:     parameter NB_PRIV_LVL    = 4,   
413:     parameter PRIV_LVL_WIDTH = 4   
414:   )(
415:     input logic [PRIV_LVL_WIDTH-1:0] 	       priv_lvl_i,   
416:     input logic [NB_SUBORDINATE-1:0][NB_MANAGER-1:0][NB_PRIV_LVL-1:0] access_ctrl_i,  
417:     
418:     output logic [NB_SUBORDINATE-1:0][NB_MANAGER-1:0]  connectivity_map_o
419:   ); 
420: 
421:     
422:   genvar i,j ; 
423: 
424:   generate
425:     
426:     for (i=0; i<NB_SUBORDINATE; i++)
427:     begin
428:       	for (j=0; j<NB_MANAGER; j++)
429:       	begin
430: 	  assign connectivity_map_o[i][j] = access_ctrl_i[i][j][priv_lvl_i] || ((j==6) && access_ctrl_i[i][7][priv_lvl_i]) ; 
431:       	end  		    		      		
432:     end
433: 
434:   endgenerate 
435: 
436: endmodule
